overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy video game showing a character in dark wizard robes exploring a gothic stone castle interior. The character walks past a large memorial statue, ascends a stone staircase, and approaches an ornate wooden door in a candlelit antechamber.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic castle hall with memorial statue

agents.ego_description: walking slowly toward the large wizard statue while observing the stone architecture and candle arrangements

entered.detail: large stone statue of a robed wizard holding a staff, standing on a raised pedestal
tall carved stone column with intricate patterns
tall carved stone column matching the left pillar
group of lit candles on a stone pedestal
group of lit candles on a stone pedestal
large stone archway framing the statue in the background

segments.scene_description: The character stands in a dimly lit gothic hall facing a massive wizard statue at the far end. Stone pillars flank the sides with clusters of burning candles providing warm light against the cool stone walls.

events.description: turns right away from the statue hall to ascend the stone staircase

agents.ego_description: turning right and walking up the stone stairs toward an upper level doorway

entered.detail: wide stone steps ascending to the right with worn edges
stone archway at the top of the stairs leading to another chamber
large dark wooden door with metal studs visible through the archway
lit wall-mounted lantern with warm glow

segments.scene_description: The character turns right and begins ascending a stone staircase. The wizard statue falls behind as the character climbs toward an arched passage with a wooden door visible at the top, illuminated by wall sconces.

events.description: reaches the top of the stairs and enters the small antechamber

agents.ego_description: approaching the large wooden door at the end of the corridor

entered.detail: upholstered high-backed chair with wooden frame
circular patterned rug on the stone floor
narrow wooden table against the right wall
carved stone seating along the left wall

segments.scene_description: Having reached the top of the stairs, the character enters a cozy antechamber featuring an ornate armchair, a decorative rug, and a wooden console table. The character walks toward the large wooden door that dominates the far end of the room.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cavernous gothic hall into a small, intimate antechamber. It begins facing a massive wizard statue at the end of a dimly lit hall, where clusters of burning candles cast a warm glow against cool stone pillars. As the character turns right, the camera ascends a stone staircase, leaving the statue behind and moving toward an arched passage illuminated by wall sconces. The scene then opens into a cozy upper room featuring a decorative rug, an ornate armchair, and a wooden console table. Finally, the camera glides across the room toward a large, ornate wooden door that dominates the far wall.
